user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Alpine Ski House.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 13:44 EST
Subject: URGENT: forecast prep Issue at Alpine Ski House

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-17 14:41 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for forecast prep. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: forecast prep Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-03-22
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), David (Alpine Ski House)

[00:01:15] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is forecast prep.

[00:08:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:11:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] David (Alpine Ski House): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:24:00] David (Alpine Ski House): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:28:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): On the forecast prep front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.
